title: Filter2DSettings
description: Settings for the Filter2D sync task.

r_inner.description: Inner radius in pixels (non-negative). Controls the inner boundary of the spatial frequency filter.

r_outer.description: Outer radius in pixels (non-negative). Controls the outer boundary of the spatial frequency filter.

s_inner.description: Inner slope (smoothness) in pixels (non-negative). Defines the smoothing width around the inner radius.

s_outer.description: Outer slope (smoothness) in pixels (non-negative). Defines the smoothing width around the outer radius.
